modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble using copy and paste in Excel.

full_description_text: I am trying to use copy and paste in Excel but it is not working. I select the text and hit copy, then I go to paste it but nothing happens. I don't know why this is happening and it is really frustrating.
short_description: Trouble using copy and paste in Excel.
description: I am trying to use copy and paste in Excel but it is not working. I select the text and hit copy, then I go to paste it but nothing happens. I don't know why this is happening and it is really frustrating.
